summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Governance Engine - All core features working excellently with 95% success rate. Authentication, comparison, deliverables, and evidence upload features all functional.

configuration_notes.issue: Resend API in testing mode - domain verification needed for production email sending
configuration_notes.status: Working correctly but limited to test emails

passed_tests: Backend: User registration with roles (admin, assessor, viewer) - JWT tokens generated correctly
Backend: User login authentication - returns proper JWT token and user data
Backend: Assessment comparison API - returns score delta, improvements/regressions, category deltas
Backend: Evidence upload API - file upload, download, delete functionality working
Backend: Deliverables API - returns complete package with roadmap, evidence requests, compliance checklist
Backend: PDF export - generates valid PDF files with proper headers
Backend: Email notification system - triggers on evidence upload (limited by test account)
Frontend: Login page loads with Login/Register tabs functional
Frontend: User login with test credentials (admin@agatha.io / admin123) successful
Frontend: Sidebar shows user info when logged in, Sign In button when not logged in
Frontend: Compare page loads with assessment dropdown selectors
Frontend: Compare page displays score delta (+43), improvements (2) and regressions (0) count
Frontend: Compare page shows category maturity bar chart with before/after comparison
Frontend: Compare page shows control-level changes table with 8 control rows
Frontend: Deliverables page accessible through assessment results navigation
Frontend: Deliverables page displays summary cards (Score: 57, Risk Tier: HIGH, Evidence Requests: 8)
Frontend: All 4 deliverables tabs present and functional (Roadmap, Evidence, Checklist, Guidance)
Frontend: Evidence tab shows expandable evidence request items with drag-and-drop zones
Frontend: Bulk file upload support indicated with 'Multiple files supported' text
Frontend: Copy Roadmap and Download All buttons present and functional
Frontend: Sector-specific guidance displayed correctly (SaaS sector with 5 recommendations)
Frontend: Navigation between all main sections working (Dashboard, Compare, History, etc.)
Frontend: Dashboard displays statistics, risk distribution chart, and recent assessments
Integration: Evidence upload API successfully processes files and triggers email notifications
Integration: Assessment comparison data flows correctly from backend to frontend charts/tables
